scripts.check: pnpm run check:harness && pnpm run check:generated && pnpm run lint && pnpm run typecheck && pnpm run test && pnpm run build
scripts.lint: turbo run lint && UV_CACHE_DIR=.uv-cache uv run ruff check apps/api/src apps/api/tests apps/worker/src
scripts.test: turbo run test && UV_CACHE_DIR=.uv-cache uv run pytest
scripts.typecheck: turbo run typecheck && UV_CACHE_DIR=.uv-cache uv run mypy apps/api/src apps/worker/src
